methods.description: Collection of representative samples from soil horizons and rock lithologies in and around the cave and its catchment during the austral winter expedition with RV Gran Campo II in 2015. Samples included distinguished horizons of four peat soil profiles, weathered rock fragments from lowermost peat soil horizons, and unweathered rocks from the cave's walls.

steps.description: Conduct a representative sampling from soil horizons and rock lithologies in and around the cave and its catchment during the austral winter expedition with RV Gran Campo II in 2015.
steps.searchable_summary: Collect soil and rock samples from specific locations around a cave.
inputs: Expedition details (RV Gran Campo II, austral winter 2015)
outputs: Collected soil samples (from peat soil profiles)
Collected rock samples (weathered fragments, unweathered rocks)

methods.description: Preparation of collected soil and rock samples for subsequent trace element analysis and other measurements, including crushing and milling.

steps.searchable_summary: Prepare collected soil and rock samples for analysis.
Mill crushed samples to obtain pulverized bulk samples.

methods.description: Analysis of trace element concentrations (Pb, Y, and Se) in pulverized bulk samples using ICP-MS after acid digestion. Calibration was performed using the international standard JA-2.

steps.description: Perform acid digestion of pulverized bulk samples using an ultra-pure HF/HClO4-HF/HNO3 mixture in a pressurized Teflon apparatus (Picotrace®).
steps.searchable_summary: Digest pulverized samples using a specific acid mixture and pressurized apparatus.

steps.description: Realize trace element analysis (Pb, Y and Se) of digested samples with ICP-MS (Perkin Elmer DRC II Q-ICP-MS).
steps.searchable_summary: Measure trace element concentrations (Pb, Y, Se) using ICP-MS.
inputs: ICP-MS instrument (Perkin Elmer DRC II Q-ICP-MS)
outputs: Trace element concentrations (Pb, Y, Se) for each sample

steps.description: Apply the international standard JA-2 to calibrate these ICP-MS measurements.
steps.searchable_summary: Calibrate ICP-MS measurements using an international standard.

methods.description: Detection of pH values of soil horizons using a digital pH meter in CaCl2 solution.

steps.description: Detect the pH values of soil horizons in CaCl2 solution using a digital pH meter.
steps.searchable_summary: Measure pH of soil samples in CaCl2 solution using a digital pH meter.

methods.description: Incorporation of previously published data from related studies, including ICP-MS/OES measurements, U/Th dating, age-depth models, and specific trace element concentrations (Y, Se, U) of the MA1 stalagmite/speleothem.

steps.description: Obtain detailed information concerning previously obtained ICP-MS/OES measurements of drilled samples along the growth axis of the MA1 stalagmite as presented in Schimpf et al. (2011).
steps.searchable_summary: Retrieve previously published ICP-MS/OES data for stalagmite samples.
outputs: Previous ICP-MS/OES data for MA1 stalagmite

steps.description: Obtain previously published U/Th dating and the age-depth model information for the MA1 stalagmite as presented in Schimpf et al. (2011).
steps.searchable_summary: Retrieve previously published U/Th dating and age-depth model data for stalagmite.
outputs: Previous U/Th dating data for MA1 stalagmite
Previous age-depth model for MA1 stalagmite

steps.description: Obtain already published trace element concentrations of the MA1 speleothem used here, specifically Y, Se and U, from Schimpf et al. (2011) and Kilian et al. (2013).
steps.searchable_summary: Retrieve previously published trace element concentrations (Y, Se, U) for speleothem.
inputs: References: Schimpf et al. (2011), Kilian et al. (2013)
outputs: Previous trace element concentrations (Y, Se, U) for MA1 speleothem
